title: 2 in 1 Aurora Borealis & Oceanic Waves LED Starry Sky Projector with Remote Control & 7 Light Effects, Galaxy Projector Lamp for Bedroom Decoration
features: Charming Atmosphere: Immerse yourself in a magical wonderland with this 2-in-1 Northern Lights and Ocean Wave Projector. Transform your room into a mesmerizing space with luminous water waves and stars projected onto your ceiling or walls, creating a soothing atmosphere in your bedroom or living room.

Amazing Lighting Effects: You will have 7 matching aurora effects, explore a variety of RGB colorful variations and lighting modes suitable for different occasions. Whether you're hosting a party or aiming to create a cozy ambiance in your bedroom, this projector lamp offers diverse lighting options to suit your needs.

Sensitive Music Activated: Our LED ocean wave projector has a cool feature, with three music modes. MUSIC1:sound active mode,light off; MUSIC2:sound active mode.dynamic; MUSIC3:sound active mode,strobe effects. You can have the projection sync with your music, easily create the most ideal party atmosphere.

Remote Control and Rechargeable: The star projector comes with a remote control that can freely turn ON/OFF the northern lights and starry night sky, change the lighting mode, speed. This ocean wave projector powered by a USB cable, compact and portable and can be taken anywhere, elevate any environment with a touch of enchanting lighting wherever you go.

Great Room Decor and Gift Ideas: This ocean wave projection light is perfect for you to decorate bedroom, game room, home theatre, show, Christmas decorations, party decorations, wedding, birthday and anniversary. A great gift for all seasons and excellent present for family.
